resolvedQuestions.label: Quality rubric for code work
resolvedQuestions.summary: Coder Acceptance Rubric: Correctness 30 / Scope-Adherence 20 / Verification-Evidence 20 / Stack-Pattern-Compliance 15 / Integration 15; bands EXCELLENT/ACCEPTABLE/NEEDS REVISION/REJECTED; severity P0/P1/P2 with P0 hard-block.

keyFindings.label: @review §5 (lines 116-152) is the structural template to mirror
Verification-Evidence deserves its own scoring weight (sk-code Iron Law line 62)
Stack-Pattern-Compliance dimension owned by sk-code Phase 1.5, not embedded in @code body
Security/correctness baseline minimums always enforced via P0/P1 overrides
Scope-Adherence deserves coder-side weight (AGENTS.md scope-lock + Bash-bypass)
